title: Recent M&A Trends: Mergers are always beneficial for shareholders of the acquiring firm....
summary: Assess whether mergers are always beneficial for acquiring firm shareholders based on empirical evidence.
prompt: Mergers are always beneficial for shareholders of the acquiring firm.
solution: Mergers can lead to overpayment, poor performance, and negative returns for acquiring firm shareholders. Studies show that acquiring firms often experience negative returns following M&A announcements.
